ip_outcome_note: Vision pass flagged suspected_ip: Basri Ket at low confidence. The depicted figure is a catfolk (Cat Cleric per Scryfall type_line), not Basri Ket — Basri is human. The flavor text names Basri ('Basri carries on his god's legacy') but that is reference to him, not a depiction of him. Basri's Acolyte is an anonymous follower spreading Oketra's teachings on Basri's behalf. The low confidence flag was appropriate; refutation is clear. No Basri Ket IP concern applies to this card.

trivia_bullets.text: Basri Ket is the debut planeswalker of Core Set 2021 (released July 2020), designed as a spiritual successor to Gideon Jura in white's martial-paladin slot. According to Wizards' 'Creating Basri Ket' feature, designer Daniel Ketchum described him as 'a paladin in the truest sense, duty sworn to an ideal.' [Wizards of the Coast: 'Creating Basri Ket', 2020-06-08]
sources: Wizards of the Coast: 'Creating Basri Ket', 2020-06-08

trivia_bullets.text: Flavor text: "Basri carries on his god's legacy, spreading her teachings throughout the Multiverse." [Scryfall]. The pronoun 'her' refers to Oketra, Amonkhet's cat-headed god of solidarity who was killed by Nicol Bolas during the Hour of Devastation. The depicted catfolk cleric is one of these Oketra-faith evangelists spreading her doctrine in Basri's wake.
sources: Wizards of the Coast: 'Creating Basri Ket', 2020-06-08

trivia_bullets.text: The Showcase frame variant (collector no. 287) is the M21 Showcase treatment; the standard frame prints as collector no. 8 in the same set. Both use Leesha Hannigan's art. The card is also legal in Pauper and Paupercommander formats per Scryfall legalities, giving the Cat Cleric reach beyond just Commander. [Scryfall]

As a 2/3 Lifelink for 4 mana that distributes +1/+1 counters to two other creatures on entry, Basri's Acolyte slots into go-wide white counter strategies. EDHREC rank 14,172 is mid-tier for a common, reflecting niche but consistent Commander adoption. Pauper legality makes it a standout in that format's limited white creature pool. [Scryfall]
